About me

A world turned
into a home
& office.

My name is Rogério Marques — digital nomad since 2023, world traveler, and content creator with 5 years of experience in marketing and copywriting.

After living in London and deciding to travel the world full-time, I built an audience of engaged travelers who use my social media as a window to the world.

I don't just promote. I tell stories. With a background in funnels, scripting, and video editing, I understand the full process — from briefing to results.

"A world traveler and digital nomad, born in Brazil, who turned the world into my home and office."

— Rogério Marques
Currently based in
Asia

More than numbers

A community
that trusts & acts.

They don't just
watch — they book,
buy & explore.

Numbers tell part of the story. But what truly sets my audience apart is the trust they place in my recommendations. They use my content as a real guide to the world.

Through my profile and partnerships, my followers have already taken action — booking accommodations, purchasing travel insurance, buying flights, joining volunteer programs, and booking guided tours. Real decisions. Real conversions.

That's the kind of community every brand deserves access to — one that's engaged, curious, and ready to move.

How we work

The process
is simple.

01
Briefing
I send you a briefing with essential questions to understand your brand, tone and goals.
02
Production
Content is produced according to the partnership type. For accommodations, production happens during the stay.
03
Editing
All content — editing, scripting, and final adjustments — delivered within 10 days of production.
04
Approval
Content is sent to you for review and approval before going live. Your brand is always protected.
05
Publishing
Content goes live on my profile with collaboration tag. Additional content can be negotiated.
06
Report
After publishing, I send you a full metrics and performance report to measure the real impact.

Beyond promotion.
Real strategy.

With 5 years of experience in marketing and a background as a copywriter, I bring a strong edge to every collaboration — from building funnels to writing scripts and editing videos.

I understand the full process. Beyond just promoting, I recommend the best digital strategies to help partners get real results.

Right now, traveling through Southeast Asia, sharing my journey with a growing audience who will love discovering your brand.

Let's create
something great.

Whether you're an accommodation, travel brand, or lifestyle business — I'd love to bring your story to life.
